summary: Comprehensive testing of Tennis Buddies Club - All 10 requested features tested and working. Backend 100% pass rate (19/19 tests), Frontend all flows working correctly.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> - does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Match reminders created during testing are visible in chatroom
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 features tested successfully: 1) Login/Register (admin & member), 2) Navigation (all 8 nav links visible when logged in), 3) Admin Panel (all 6 tabs working), 4) Match Reminder (posts to chatroom successfully), 5) Season Standings (19 players displayed), 6) Opponent Scout (Gemini AI generates strategy/tactics/warnings), 7) Strategy Bot (Gemini AI responds to questions), 8) Chatroom (shows messages including match reminders), 9) Education (articles with categories), 10) Solo Ladder (player rankings with podium). Backend tests cover auth, season standings, solo ladder, education, chatroom, opponent scout, strategy bot, match reminders, admin panel, schedules, and stats.

1_login_register.details: Admin login (admin@tennis.com/admin123) and member login (player@tennis.com/player123) both working

2_navigation.details: All nav links visible when logged in: Home, Schedule, Standings, Ladder, Learn, Scout, AI Coach, Chat

3_admin_panel.details: Admin panel accessible at /admin with all 6 tabs: Matches, Round Robin, Players, Content, Announcements, Settings

4_match_reminder.details: Match reminder feature in Round Robin tab works - posts reminder to chatroom with date and message

5_season_standings.details: Season standings page loads at /season-standings showing 19 players with podium and full table

6_opponent_scout.details: Opponent Scout (Gemini AI) generates strategy, key tactics (6 items), and warnings based on opponent profile

7_strategy_bot.details: Strategy Bot (Gemini AI) responds to questions with detailed tactical advice

8_chatroom.details: Chatroom shows 4 messages including match reminders from admin, input field and send button working

9_education.details: Education page loads with categories (Technique, Strategy, Fitness, Equipment) and articles

10_solo_ladder.details: Solo Ladder shows player rankings with podium (top 3) and full table with 6+ players
